div.h1: Data Flow: Compiler Vectorization Decision Pipeline

div.p: Use restrict keyword: c void func(float* restrict dst, const float* restrict a);
Failure Reason: Cannot prove pointers don't overlap Example: dst = a + 1 causes overlap

ul.li: Does iteration i+1 depend on i?

div.p: Failure Reason: Loop-carried dependency detected Example: sum += a[i] (FP reduction needs -ffast-math)

ul.li: Is trip count known at compile time?

div.p: Caution (not fatal): Uses unaligned loads (movups) May be slower on older CPUs
Failure Reason: Overhead exceeds benefit Example: Loop with < 16 iterations
